justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's time preferences throughout the conversation, including the initial correction from PM to AM and subsequent date changes.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering a range of alternative options or proactively suggesting different times of day after multiple rejections.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation involved multiple avoidable round-trips as the agent repeatedly checked for the exact same time (9 AM) on consecutive days without offering a broader search or alternative suggestions earlier.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was frustrating due to the agent's repetitive responses and inability to proactively suggest a wider range of alternative times or days after multiple failed attempts to book at 9 AM.

overall_notes: The agent was stuck in a loop of checking 9 AM on consecutive days, which led to a very inefficient and frustrating customer experience.
